creator: empty.japan
caption:
Japan Solo Trip: Yes or No?

Japan is like an endless playground of experiences – you barely have a moment to feel lonely. And, strangely enough, some places even feel better when you’re on your own. Does anyone else feel the same, or is it just me?

As for safety, I’ve explored both big cities and tiny towns solo and have never felt safer anywhere else in the world. I’ve walked around late at night, caught the last train, and wandered down side streets – it’s just… calm. Of course, it’s still important to stay aware and not look for trouble on purpose. But as a solo female traveler, that sense of peace is one of the main reasons I love living in Japan.

For me, it’s definitely a yes. If you’ve had a similar or different experience, I’d love to hear about it! ❤️
